display_name: Add Animation Set To Existing Unit
description: Find or accept animation sequences, convert them into FAnimsData, and union-merge only AnimShared.AnimData into an existing unit.

input_schema.skeletal_mesh: Optional USkeletalMesh path used to discover animations by skeleton.
input_schema.found_anims: Optional FFoundAnimSequences JSON. If provided with data_asset, this can produce an AnimShared merge patch directly.
input_schema.unit_patch: Optional extra source-aligned unit Data JSON to merge with AnimShared.

pipeline.description: Use skeletal_mesh plus animation_search_path to discover candidate animations.
Use data_asset plus found_anims to generate AnimShared.AnimData values.
Union-merge AnimShared.AnimData into the existing unit without touching unrelated fields.
